_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluation delivery involves using data collection and analytical techniques to evaluate a digital product or service across the development cycle.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements definition, proof-of-concept design and execution, technical and commercial assessment, and selection recommendation.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.495), AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.594). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DDaT-only terms [across, analytical, collection, cycle, delivery, development] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, definition] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.872, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Evaluation delivery involves using data collection and analytical techniques to" and "Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements def" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.592 ≈ STS 0.594 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.1%. Shared tokens: [data]. DDaT-only: [across, analytical, collection, cycle, delivery, development]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, definition].
